SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server

Interface RMIServerStub

All Superinterfaces:
Remote
All Known Implementing Classes:
RMIServer
public interface RMIServerStub extends Remote
This interface is used by the server to communicate with the client. It contains all the methods that the server can call on the client.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    availableLobbies(RMIClientSkeleton client)
    This method is used to get the available lobbies.
    void
    chooseObjective(int clientId, String p, int cardId)
    This method is used to make a player chose an objective.
    void
    chooseToken(int clientId, String p, Token t)
    This method is used to make a player chose a token.
    void
    createGame(RMIClientSkeleton client, int clientId, String name, int numOfPlayers)
    This method is used to create a new game.
    void
    drawCardFromAvailable(int clientId, String p, int cardId)
    This method is used to make a player draw a card from the available cards.
    void
    drawCardFromDeck(int clientId, String p, String d)
    This method is used to make a player draw a card from the deck.
    void
    joinGame(RMIClientSkeleton client, int clientId, int controllerHash, String name)
    This method is used to join a game.
    void
    ping(int clientId)
    This method is used to check if the player is still connected.
    void
    placeCard(int clientId, String player, int cardId, String side, Position pos)
    This method is used to make a player place a card on the field

  • Method Details

    • createGame

      void createGame(RMIClientSkeleton client, int clientId, String name, int numOfPlayers) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to create a new game.
      Parameters:
      client - The client that is creating the game.
      clientId - The id of the client that is creating the game.
      name - The name of the game.
      numOfPlayers - The number of players that the game will have.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - If there is an error in the communication.

    • availableLobbies

      void availableLobbies(RMIClientSkeleton client) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to get the available lobbies.
      Parameters:
      client - The client that is asking for the available lobbies.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - If there is an error in the communication.

    • joinGame

      void joinGame(RMIClientSkeleton client, int clientId, int controllerHash, String name) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to join a game.
      Parameters:
      client - The client that is joining the game.
      clientId - The id of the client that is joining the game.
      controllerHash - The hash of the controller that the client is using.
      name - The name of the player that is joining the game.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - If there is an error in the communication.

    • chooseToken

      void chooseToken(int clientId, String p, Token t) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to make a player chose a token.
      Parameters:
      clientId - The id of the client that is making the choice.
      p - The name of the player that is making the choice.
      t - The token that the player is choosing.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - If there is an error in the communication.

    • chooseObjective

      void chooseObjective(int clientId, String p, int cardId) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to make a player chose an objective.
      Parameters:
      clientId - The id of the client that is making the choice.
      p - The name of the player that is making the choice.
      cardId - The id of the card that the player is choosing.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - If there is an error in the communication.

    • placeCard

      void placeCard(int clientId, String player, int cardId, String side, Position pos) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to make a player place a card on the field
      Parameters:
      clientId - The id of the client that is making the choice.
      player - The name of the player that is making the choice.
      cardId - The id of the card that the player is placing.
      side - The side of the card that the player is placing.
      pos - The position on the board where the player is placing the card.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - If there is an error in the communication.

    • drawCardFromDeck

      void drawCardFromDeck(int clientId, String p, String d) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to make a player draw a card from the deck.
      Parameters:
      clientId - The id of the client that is making the choice.
      p - The name of the player that is making the choice.
      d - The side of the card that the player is drawing.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - If there is an error in the communication.

    • drawCardFromAvailable

      void drawCardFromAvailable(int clientId, String p, int cardId) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to make a player draw a card from the available cards.
      Parameters:
      clientId - The id of the client that is making the choice.
      p - The name of the player that is making the choice.
      cardId - The id of the card that the player is drawing.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - If there is an error in the communication.

    • ping

      void ping(int clientId) throws RemoteException
      This method is used to check if the player is still connected.
      Parameters:
      clientId - The id of the client that is being checked.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - If there is an error in the communication.
